title: Tiger stepping away from golf to seek treatment
content: In a statement four days after his arrest in Florida, Tiger Woods said Tuesday he's "committed to taking the time needed to return to a healthier, stronger, and more focused place, both personally and professionally."

title: Portugal outclasses U.S. amid Pulisic goal drought
content: The United States dropped its second match in a row Tuesday, losing to Portugal in a friendly at Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta to conclude its March international window.

title: Goodell backs Rooney Rule amid litigation threat
content: NFL commissioner Roger Goodell said he believes the Rooney Rule is "consistent" with hiring laws after recently being threatened by Florida's attorney general with potential civil litigation if the rule was not eliminated.

title: Ump Bucknor in spotlight again after missed call
content: Umpire C.B. Bucknor, who had the poorest results among umpires in MLB's new ABS system last weekend, had another call overturned at first base during Tuesday's Brewers-Rays game.

title: Italy miss out on 3rd straight WC in shootout loss
content: Italy has missed out on a third-consecutive World Cup after losing to Bosnia and Herzegovina in a penalty shootout on Tuesday in Zenica.

title: Ovechkin extends record with 20th 30-goal season
content: Alex Ovechkin scored twice and hit the 30-goal mark for the record-extending 20th time in his NHL career, and the Washington Capitals beat the Philadelphia Flyers 6-4 on Tuesday night.

title: Hurley: I thought ref was looking to 'chest-bump'
content: UConn coach Dan Hurley downplayed his bizarre interaction with an official at the end of Sunday's NCAA tournament victory against Duke, saying he thought the referee was looking to "chest-bump me to celebrate."

title: With lockout possible, MLBPA war chest at $415M
content: MLB players have accumulated $415 million in U.S. Treasury securities, cash and other investments as they prepare for the possibility of an extended lockout when the CBA expires on Dec. 1.

title: 📉 2026 Pain Index: Where does Duke's loss rank?
content: Some losses are understandable in the NCAA tournament. Others will haunt us forever (see: Duke). We rank them all.

title: What we heard at the 2026 annual league meeting: Last-minute buzz from more than 25 NFL teams
content: Annual NFL owners meeting wrapped up Tuesday, and 30 of our reporters shared all the buzz from Phoenix.

title: 18-game regular season? Mixed reaction by NFL owners, coaches
content: Colts, Chiefs, Browns and Patriots owners among those talking about feasibility of expanding schedule.

title: Should the USMNT be concerned about Pulisic's goal drought?
content: Roberto Martinez might think it's "worthless" to read into any results ahead of the World Cup, but alarm bells must surely be ringing in the USMNT camp over Christian Pulisic's 14-match goal drought.

title: Six free agency options for LeBron, according to NBA coaches, execs and scouts
content: Lakers? Cavs? Warriors? A wild card? Before LeBron James makes his decision this summer, sources around the league weigh in.

title: Best team fits for 20 draft prospects: We found matches for Mansoor Delane, Caleb Downs, Denzel Boston
content: We took 20 NFL draft prospects who could get picked in Rounds 1 and 2 and found ideal scheme matches based on what each player does best.

title: A wagon ... or a freight train? How the Sabres became the newest Stanley Cup contender
content: Buffalo isn't just ending a playoff drought; it's smashing the gate open. Here's how the Sabres have done it, and how dangerous they'll be this spring.

content: Both clubs need the two points on the line in Tuesday's matchup. Plus, full playoff projections and more.

content: Is your team a threat to win big -- or a disappointment waiting to happen? It depends on who is asked.

content: From Chase DeLauter to JJ Wetherholt, these young players are making an immediate impact for their teams.

title: Türkiye will be USMNT's stiffest test in World Cup group stage
content: Türkiye could be one of the World Cup's most dangerous outsiders. Are they now Group D favorites over the U.S.? Here's what to know about the team.

title: Meet the World Cup debutants: Cape Verde, Curaçao, Jordan, Uzbekistan tell their stories
content: Experts on each national team to qualify for their first World Cup help us get to know their country.

content: The pressure of expectation derailed the Huskies' bid for a three-peat. Perspective has them back in contention.

content: No. 1 seeds UConn, UCLA, Texas and South Carolina head to the Final Four for the second consecutive year.

content: After Texas' and South Carolina's wins, the Final Four is set! Here's everything you need to know from Monday.

title: Dybantsa, Boozer, Acuff headline men's Wooden finalists and All-America selections
content: Michigan's Yaxel Lendeborg and Purdue's Braden Smith join the trio of freshmen to make the cut for both.

title: UConn's Strong, Fudd headline women's Wooden Award finalists
content: Four players who will be on the court at the women's Final Four in Phoenix are among the five Wooden Award finalists.

title: MLB awards: Judge and Ohtani once again favored to win MVP honors
content: Who are the favorites to win seasonlong honors? Here are the odds for MVP, Cy Young and Rookie of the Year in the AL and NL.

title: Closer stock watch: Don't run from Carlos Estevez just yet
content: Everything fantasy baseball managers need to know about which closers should be added, dropped and more.

title: Draft guide: Rankings, tips, strategy, stats and more
content: All the rankings, projections, cheat sheets, strategy and analysis you need for the fantasy baseball season.

title: 'That's like Miami Bron': LeBron James confirms breaking driveway backboard vs. Bronny
content: LeBron James wasn't letting a younger Bronny James have a shot at a win, and he broke a backboard in the process.

title: Pickups: Harper, Sexton, Hayes among top players to add
content: Advancing in the fantasy basketball playoffs means finding available players who can help fill holes in your roster. Here are the ones to add for the week ahead.

title: Boxing divisional rankings: Moses Itauma crashes into heavyweight top 5
content: Moses Itauma disposed of Jermaine Franklin Jr. to move up at heavyweight. Here are the latest ESPN divisional rankings.

title: US to exit Nato? Trump slams alliance as 'paper tiger' as bloc dithers on joining Iran war
content: President Trump is strongly considering withdrawing the US from Nato, labeling the alliance a 'paper tiger' due to European allies' refusal to support US actions in the Iran conflict. He cited a lack of reciprocity and criticized the UK's stance. The US may re-examine its Nato role, with potential structural changes like a 'pay-to-play' model being discussed.

title: OTP can't secure payments: RBI rolls out stricter digital payment rules
content: India's digital payments are getting a security boost from April 1 with stricter RBI authentication rules, requiring two-factor verification for all transactions to combat rising fraud.  Beyond digital payments, changes affect credit cards, FASTags, RuPay cards, PAN applications, and banking services, alongside a new income tax framework, aiming for a safer financial ecosystem.

title: Pushed out by Jyoti Basu, eclipsed by Mamata, crushed by BJP: Congress' 50-year exile in West Bengal
content: Once a dominant force, West Bengal's Congress party has seen its influence dwindle significantly over five decades. From landslide victories to being overshadowed by communist rule and then Mamata Banerjee's Trinamool Congress, the party now struggles for relevance.

title: Oracle layoffs: Company sets this severance condition for laid-off employees
content: Oracle has started its largest-ever layoffs, impacting thousands globally. Employees must sign termination documents via DocuSign to receive severance, which appears less generous than competitors.  These cuts, potentially reaching 30,000, aim to fund a massive AI data center expansion, a move that has placed the company under significant financial strain.

title: From income tax to FASTag fee: 10 things that will change your finances from April 1
content: Some of the changes affect credit card users, FASTag subscribers, RuPay debit cardholders. Here are some of the key revisions scheduled for implementation from the start of the new financial year.

title: 'Rs 5000 lagakar dekho': Shami on Goenka's viral boundary talks with KL Rahul, Pant
content: LSG owner Sanjiv Goenka's interactions with captains after defeats have sparked debate. However, pacer Mohammed Shami defended Goenka, stating he is passionate about cricket and his high expectations are justified due to his significant investment in the team. Shami emphasized Goenka's logical communication and positive player interactions.

title: Oracle layoffs: Employees in India, US, & other regions receive email at 6am
content: Oracle has initiated widespread global layoffs, impacting employees in the US, India, and other regions without prior notice.  Termination emails, sent directly from leadership, cited organizational changes as the reason, with affected teams seeing significant reductions.  This move is reportedly to fund Oracle's ambitious, debt-financed AI infrastructure expansion, potentially impacting thousands of jobs.

title: Make in India boost: Armed with sensors, torpedoes, rockets, submarine hunter ‘Malwan’ joins Navy
content: The Indian Navy has received 'Malwan', its second Anti-Submarine Warfare Shallow Water Craft, built by Cochin Shipyard Limited. This vessel, with over 80% indigenous content, is designed for coastal defense and underwater warfare, strengthening India's maritime capabilities. The delivery aligns with the nation's push for indigenous defense manufacturing.

title: 'Hat-trick of defeat for Congress certain': PM Modi takes 'rajkumar' dig at Rahul Gandhi in Assam
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi launched a strong attack on Congress in Assam, dubbing Rahul Gandhi a "Rajkumar" and predicting electoral defeats. He expressed confidence in the BJP-led NDA securing a "hattrick" in the state, highlighting development under Sarbananda Sonowal and Himanta Biswa Sarma. PM Modi also promised a Uniform Civil Code and positioned Assam as a future tech hub.

title: $340 bn Anthropic that wiped trillions from stock market has source code of its tool leaked
content: AI firm Anthropic suffered a significant source code leak of its Claude Code agent, exposing unreleased features like an always-on AI and a pet system. This marks the third such incident for the company, which is reportedly preparing for a massive $380 billion IPO. The leak offers a rare glimpse into the company's development practices.

title: Anti-drone laser defence system in Washington to protect Hegseth, Rubio: How it works
content: A new direct energy anti-drone system, including lasers, has been installed near Palm Beach International Airport to protect high-profile individuals and locations. This deployment addresses rising drone threats in modern warfare, adding a mobile defense layer to secure sensitive airspace and civilian aviation.

title: Fortnite v40.10 update release time for all regions
content: Fortnite's v40.10 update is scheduled for April 1, 2026, bringing new cosmetics, balance changes, and gameplay adjustments. Servers will go down for approximately two hours starting at 4 AM ET, with maintenance expected to conclude around 6 AM ET. Players can anticipate new content, potentially including April Fools' themed skins like Tung Tung Tung Sahur.

title: 'Dhurandhar2' BO Day 14: Ranveer Singh film eyes Rs 1000 crore net milestone
content: 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' has shattered records, officially crossing the Rs. 900 crore India net milestone. In just two weeks, the Aditya Dhar directorial has collected a staggering Rs.903.22 crore domestic net, surpassing the lifetime totals of almost every Indian blockbuster to date. Led by Ranveer Singh's career-defining performance as Hamza, the film has shown incredible resilience against the IPL 2026 matches, maintaining massive footfalls across theatres nationwide. With a current India gross of Rs. 1,081.31 crore and a global haul nearing Rs. 1,400 crore, the spy epic featuring Sanjay Dutt and Arjun Rampal is now chasing the historic Rs. 1,000 crore India net club.

title: Government tightens oversight of GLP-1 drugs, flags risks amid rising demand; key details
content: The Centre has issued a detailed advisory on GLP-1 receptor agonist drugs, emphasizing their use for type 2 diabetes and obesity must be strictly under medical supervision. Authorities are increasing regulatory surveillance and warning of strict action against violations in their sale or prescription.

title: Congress slams Centre over bill proposing to increase Lok Sabha seats
content: Congress has opposed a bill to increase Lok Sabha seats by 50%, arguing it disadvantages southern, northeastern, and western states. The party claims the proposal, which would significantly boost representation for northern states, is deceptive and could be a 'weapon of mass diversion' from government failures.

title: Why Iran's Mojtaba Khamenei hasn’t appeared in public? Russian envoy explains
content: Mojtaba Khamenei remains in Iran but is not appearing publicly. Russia's ambassador to Tehran Alexey Dedov confirmed this amid widespread speculation. Rumors circulated about his health and possible medical treatment abroad. Khamenei took office after his father's death in February. Russia and Iran maintain strong diplomatic ties.

title: 'Bas ho gaya': Rishabh Pant ends Nitish Rana–Digvesh Rathi feud
content: Rishabh Pant played peacemaker between Nitish Rana and Digvesh Rathi, resolving their on-field spat during the Delhi Premier League. The LSG captain's intervention helped the two cricketers patch things up ahead of the IPL 2026 clash between Lucknow Super Giants and Delhi Capitals. Both teams are looking to improve after missing the playoffs in the previous season.

title: 10k strikes, 40 top officials killed in 40 secs: Israel outlines scale of Iran offensive
content: Israel's military revealed extensive "Operation Roar of the Lion" details, reporting over 800 sorties and 10,000 strikes against Iranian-linked targets. They claim to have eliminated 40 top Iranian officials in a swift 40-second operation. Simultaneously, Iran's IRGC reported targeting US and Israeli assets in the Persian Gulf and UAE.

title: India switches to E20 petrol from today: What it means for your car
content: India mandates E20 petrol as the standard fuel nationwide from April 1, 2025, requiring petrol pumps to supply a blend of up to 20 percent ethanol. This move aims to reduce crude oil imports and enhance energy security, with most newer vehicles already compatible, while older ones may see minor efficiency changes.

title: How this humble man from Bihar is making such a huge impact across Gujarat
content: Tarun Mishra, a man of immense compassion, manages 22 shelter homes in Gujarat, transforming lives by providing dignity, medical care, and reuniting families. Despite facing personal hardships, his unwavering intent to help others, fueled by an extraordinary heart, has positively impacted thousands, proving that kindness and determination can light up countless lives.

title: The mind behind 1,000 hoax emails: Why Mysuru man repeatedly targeted courts
content: A 47-year-old man from Mysuru, Srinivas Louis, has been arrested for sending over 1,000 hoax emails targeting courts, government offices, and schools across India and beyond. Investigators revealed his actions were driven by a deep personal grievance against the judicial system stemming from his father's unresolved land dispute.

title: FIFA World Cup 2026: All 48 teams confirmed, full groups revealed
content: The FIFA World Cup 2026 field is now complete with 48 teams confirmed after final qualifiers and playoffs. Co-hosts USA, Mexico, and Canada will stage the expanded tournament, featuring 12 groups of four teams. This edition marks a historic expansion, showcasing unprecedented global diversity in football's biggest spectacle.

title: Mumbai auto driver lifts kid by legs, smashes his head on ground after tiff with father
content: An autorickshaw driver in Palghar brutally assaulted a four-year-old boy, slamming him to the ground and smashing his head against an iron rod after an argument with the child's father. The critically injured boy is battling for life in the hospital, and the accused has been arrested.

title: Iran’s top leaders Pezeshkian and Araghchi make public appearance as war rages on
content: Iranian President Pezeshkian and Foreign Minister Araghchi made a public appearance at pro-regime rallies amid high regional tensions and threats. Araghchi highlighted popular unity, while the leaders reiterated Iran's conditions for ending conflict, countering a US proposal.  Communications with the US continue, though not as negotiations, as Iran signals readiness for defense.

title: If NDA comes to power, it won't hesitate to rename Tamil Nadu as 'Dakshin Pradesh': Stalin
content: Tamil Nadu CM MK Stalin urged voters to defeat the AIADMK-BJP alliance, accusing them of betraying minorities and Sri Lankan Tamils by supporting the CAA. He questioned AIADMK's leadership in the alliance and warned of dire consequences if the NDA comes to power, emphasizing the need to preserve Tamil Nadu's identity.

title: Why is stock market up today? Nifty50 above 22,900; BSE Sensex up over 2,000 points
content: Stock market today: Nifty 50 and BSE Sensex rallied sharply on Wednesday on hopes of an end to the US-Iran war; Nifty crossed 22,900 while Sensex surged nearly 2,000 points.

title: 'Only a partial, staggered increase': Govt issues clarification on jet fuel price hike
content: The government has limited the rise in jet fuel prices for domestic airlines to 25 percent. This decision aims to ease the financial burden on airlines and air travelers. International routes will face the full price increase. Meanwhile, non-scheduled operators are experiencing a more than double surge in jet fuel costs.

title: FIFA World Cup: Iraq end 40-year wait, Italy crash out again
content: Iraq secured the final FIFA World Cup 2026 spot by defeating Bolivia 2-1 in a playoff, marking their first appearance since 1986 despite significant off-field challenges. Meanwhile, Italy suffered another heartbreaking qualification failure, losing to Bosnia and Herzegovina 4-1 on penalties, meaning they will miss a third consecutive World Cup.

title: 'Doesn't attract the kind of money that ... ': Why Zampa chose PSL over IPL
content: Adam Zampa was named Player of the Match for his stellar 2/11 spell in Karachi Kings' PSL victory. He explained his decision to choose the PSL over the IPL, citing a lack of IPL interest and the perceived value of his skill set relative to the tournament's commitment. Zampa is enjoying his time in the PSL.

title: GST collections rise 8.2% in March 2026 to hit Rs 1.78 lakh crore
content: Domestic GST revenue reached Rs 1.46 lakh crore, registering a growth of 5.9%, while revenue from imports was recorded at Rs 0.54 lakh crore, rising sharply by 17.8% during the period.

title: Rupee at 100? Currency may weaken further against dollar as oil rises, Middle East conflict persists
content: Even prior to the conflict, the rupee was facing downward pressure due to widening external imbalances and persistent capital outflows. The surge in oil prices has intensified these challenges for the world’s third-largest crude importer.

title: Shreyas Iyer, Neeraj Chopra, Hardik Pandya: Why India’s top stars are becoming their own agents
content: India’s Rs 1,350 crore sports celebrity endorsement market is undergoing a dramatic transformation as elite athletes like Shreyas Iyer, Neeraj Chopra, Hardik Pandya, and Ishan Kishan break away from traditional agencies to assert control over their own brands and careers. By seeing themselves as businesses, these athletes are forming in-house offices and management firms, resulting in endorsement deals that are often up to three times more lucrative than before.

title: Why chef Sanjeev Kapoor was denied permission to wear chef coat for Padma Shri ceremony
content: Celebrity chef Sanjeev Kapoor was initially denied wearing his chef coat for the Padma Shri Award ceremony in 2017, being asked to wear traditional Indian attire instead. He insisted on wearing his uniform, which he considers a symbol of pride for the chef community. Ultimately, he received the award in his chef coat, setting a precedent.

title: Israel targets Iran factory, alleges fentanyl use in chemical weapons; Tehran denies
content: Israel claims it struck an Iranian pharmaceutical facility, alleging it supplied fentanyl for a chemical weapons program. Iran confirmed the strike on the Tofigh Daru factory, asserting it produces only hospital drugs. Both nations reported the incident occurred on Tuesday.

title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi reveals what fueled his 15-ball fifty vs CSK
content: Fifteen-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi continued his sensational IPL form, smashing a 15-ball half-century against Chennai Super Kings. This remarkable feat, achieved after eating a sweet, set up Rajasthan Royals' dominant win. Former India spinner Ravichandran Ashwin lauded the young talent but urged patience for his senior India debut.

title: Will UAE enter Iran war? Abu Dhabi pushes US, allies to reopen Strait of Hormuz by force
content: The UAE is reportedly considering military intervention against Iran, a significant shift from its previous neutral stance.  Repeated Iranian attacks and the disruption of the vital Strait of Hormuz have pushed Abu Dhabi to explore options, including supporting US-led efforts to reopen the oil route. This move carries substantial risks of further retaliation.

title: Assam's re-contesting MLAs get 80% richer in 5 yrs; which party saw biggest jump?
content: Assam's re-contesting MLAs have seen a significant surge in their declared wealth, with average assets jumping 80% from Rs 4.17 crore in 2021 to Rs 7.52 crore by 2026. This substantial increase highlights a notable shift in the financial standing of legislators across various parties as they seek re-election.

title: Who Are Chechen Fighters? Pro-Russian Units Offer To Back Iran Against US
content: US President Donald Trump is reportedly exploring aggressive military options in Iran, including the possible deployment of ground troops.

title: Delhi Mayor Office Receives Bomb Threat Email, Probe Launched
content: According to preliminary information, the threat was sent to the mayor's official e-mail ID, claiming that the office would be blown up around 2.11 pm.

title: Stock Market LIVE Updates, Sensex Today: Sensex Jumps 1,000 Points In Early Trade As Trump Says Will Leave Iran Soon
content: Stock Market, Sensex, Share Market, Nifty LIVE Updates: Indian stock markets are likely to see a gap-up opening on Wednesday.

title: At Least 10 Killed As Israeli Missiles Hit Beirut Overnight
content: Lebanon was drawn into the Middle East war on March 2 when Tehran-backed militant group Hezbollah launched attacks on Israel to avenge the killing of Iran's leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.

title: Forgot Your Charger? Blinkit Now Delivers Inside Mumbai Airport
content: Blinkit delivers essential items within minutes inside Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport's Terminal 2 via app-based service.

title: AI May Be Guessing X-Ray Results, Not Reading Them: Study
content: GPT-5, Gemini 3 Pro and Claude Opus 4.5 may not truly understand images, despite appearing to perform well on vision-based tasks.

title: Pak PM's Aide Photographed With Hafiz Saeed's Son Amid Terror Nexus Claims
content: The interaction points to a broader pattern of informal ties between Pakistan's ruling elite and individuals linked to extremist networks.

title: Opinion: Opinion | Why A 'Defeat' Is Now Essential For The Disoriented Left In Kerala
content: The Left losing its last bastion is a dreadful thought to Communists in general, but many of them deem it a necessary setback, one that will help the party rid itself of its maladies.

title: "I Am Really Proud": First Black Astronaut Candidate Reflects On Moon Mission
content: Victor Glover is set to make history as the first Black astronaut on the Artemis 2 Moon mission that could take off as soon as Wednesday.

title: "We Are Paying Price Of War": Americans Feel Iran Conflict At Gas Stations
content: On Tuesday, the average US price of a gallon of regular gasoline crossed the psychological barrier of $4.00, shows data from the AAA motor club.

title: Golden Toilet Near White House Mocks Trump's Return to Power
content: The statue created by an artistic group named "Secret Handshake" drew long lines of tourists and Trump opponents near the Lincoln Memorial on Tuesday.

title: From Ballroom To Airport: Trump Pushes Self-Promotion To Mark His Legacy
content: Since becoming president, Donald Trump has replicated the formula that characterised his career as a businessman: promoting his name like a brand.

title: Bengaluru Man Accuses Wife Of Sexual Torture, Forcing Intimate Act With Friend
content: The man claimed his wife subjected him to repeated sexual torture, sent him obscene videos, and pressured him to replicate such acts.

title: Karnataka Drafts Policy To Tackle Digital Addiction Among Schoolchildren
content: The policy proposes a structured, school-based approach focused on prevention, early identification, and management of digital overuse.

title: Rs 20 Payment, File Download: How Mumbai Judge Lost Rs 93,000 To Fake App Scam
content: The Mumbai city court judge noticed an issue with his phone's screen on March 30, leading him to contact a number listed online as customer care service.

title: Nepal's Everest Season Opens Under Shadow Of Multi-Million Dollar Rescue Scam
content: Between 2022 and 2025, Nepal Police confirmed more than 300 fake helicopter rescues, leading to fraudulent insurance claims worth nearly $20 million

title: Do You Post News Online? Proposed Changes To IT Rules May Invite Scrutiny
content: Under the proposed IT rules, the scope of "news and current affairs content" may be expanded to include posts by individual users.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Real Madrid eye Liverpool's Ekitike over Haaland
content: Liverpool forward Hugo Ekitike has emerged as an attractive option for Real Madrid. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Players to watch at the 2026 ANWA: Asterisk Talley, Kiara Romero among top contenders
content: The Augusta National Women's Amateur gets things started this week ahead of the Masters. Who are some players to watch?

title: Why new rules have Max Verstappen on the brink of walking away from F1
content: Max Verstappen predicted F1's new rule set would underwhelm, and 2026 is proving him correct, so much so that he might just quit the sport entirely.

title: CPI(M) slams Suresh Gopi’s MP tenure in Thrissur as ‘total failure’
content: Party alleges Suresh Gopi has done ‘nothing’ for the people of Thrissur constituency despite making ‘grand promises’ during election campaign

title: ORS labelling row: Hyderabad paediatrician Sivaranjani Santosh refuses to back down amid pressure
content: As pharma companies serve a legal notice against her, Dr. Santosh said her campaign was driven solely by concern for children’s health and warned that silencing such voices would discourage others from speaking out on public health issues

title: LPG and fuel crisis LIVE: Jet fuel prices more than doubled to ₹2.07 lakh/kl; commercial LPG up ₹195.50
content: This is the first time ever that aviation turbine fuel prices have crossed the ₹2 lakh per kilolitre mark; domestic cooking gas LPG rates, which were last hiked by ₹60 per 14.2 kg cylinder on March 7, remain unchanged

title: 1984 anti-Sikh riots crusader H.S. Phoolka joins BJP
content: In 2019, K.S. Phoolka was awarded the Padma Shri in recognition of his decades-long legal battle to secure justice for the victims of the 1984 riots

title: Parliament Budget Session LIVE: Rajya Sabha passes CAPF (General Administration) Bill
content: The Bill states that in the CAPFs, 50% of the total posts in the rank of Inspector General, at least 67% of the posts in the rank of Additional Director General, and 100% posts in the rank of Special Director General and Director General shall be filled by Indian Police Service (IPS) officers on deputation.

title: Assembly Election LIVE: Will implement Uniform Civil Code, safeguard tribals to protect Assam’s identity, says PM Modi
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi alleged that the Congress, if it comes to power in Assam, will bring in a law to protect infiltrators, which the BJP and its allies will not allow

title: Census 2027: Mandya residents urged to take part in self-enumeration
content: Citizens can log in to the official website, and complete the process by answering 33 questions related to household listing and housing census

title: Itanagar eateries told to drop meat references from names
content: Itanagar Municipal Corporation order directs hotels and restaurants to remove pork, beef, chicken or mutton references from signboards

title: Rabies confirmed after mass dog bite incident in Assam town
content: A team from a Mission Rabies centre traced the infection to a domesticated dog buried by its owner in Lanka, about 190 km from Guwahati

title: Kerala elections: Fresh row in Guruvayur as BJP candidate B. Gopalakrishnan faces backlash over flex board on past MLAs
content: Move viewed as reinforcing B. Gopalakrishnan’s controversial ‘Hindu MLA’ remark as the display is widely seen as an attempt to foreground community background of past representatives

title: Passage of ‘Amaravati Bill’ in Lok Sabha a historic moment: Lokesh
content: He stated that the Andhra Pradesh (AP) Legislative Assembly previously passed a unanimous resolution designating Amaravati as the Capital and the approval of the above Bill made the five crore people of AP extremely happy

title: CoinDCX launches ₹100 crore cybersecurity network after impersonation-linked controversy
content: CoinDCX co-founders Sumit Gupta and Neeraj Khandelwal spoke about their arrests and announced the launch of the ₹100 crore Digital Suraksha Network to support independent research, new standards, and educational tools for both state cybercrime cells and everyday Indian users

title: Lok Sabha passes bill to recognise Amaravati as Andhra capital
content: The bill, which will scuttle any future bid to alter the decision to make Amaravati the sole and permanent capital, was passed in the Lok Sabha by a voice vote

title: With NavIC setback, India unable to use satellite system for security purposes: experts
content: A major setback occurred after the last atomic clock on board the Indian Regional Navigational Satellite System-1F (IRNSS-1F) stopped functioning on March 10, leaving only three satellites of the NavIC constellation in function; armed forces of countries use the navigation satellite system for logistics, mapping and operational planning, and relying on a foreign navigation satellite system could pose security issues, especially during wars

title: Mysuru City Corporation introduces motor vehicle cess, increases property tax by 3%
content: The levy of Motor Vehicle Cess comes a year after the introduction of garbage collection cess and collection solid waste management fee from property owners with effect from April 2025

title: Israeli Defence firm supplies first batch of light machine guns to India
content: The delivery was carried out by PLR Systems, a joint venture between IWI and Adani Group, the first private company in India to manufacture small arms and ammunition

title: Residents’ association moves Madras High Court against traffic problem in MRC Nagar
content: Says, parking of motor vehicles on both sides of the narrow roads all day long prevents the free movement of even ambulances

title: Kerala Assembly polls: Pinarayi Vijayan slams ‘Congress-BJP nexus’ over G. Sudhakaran’s rebel bid in Ambalappuzha
content: Kerala CM casts G. Sudhakaran’s candidature as UDF-backed Independent in Ambalappuzha as ‘a stark example of the convergence of Congress and BJP’s transactional political lines’

title: Disproportionate assets case against A. Raja: Madras High Court seeks CBI’s response
content: Justice A.D. Jagadish Chandira orders notice to the agency on the former Union Minister’s plea to submit certain documents before the special court for MP/MLA cases in Chennai

title: How one undisclosed campaign vehicle led to an election being set aside in Tamil Nadu
content: In 1991, while AIADMK candidate R. Puthunainar Athithan was celebrating his victory in the Chernamahadevi constituency, his rival P.H. Pandian filed an election petition in the Madras High Court, accusing Athithan of having indulged in corrupt practices under the Representation of the People Act

title: Commercial LPG prices rise 10%; government caps ATF hike on domestic flights at 25%
content: The government stated that OMCs’ under-recovery from cylinders presently stand at ₹380 for every cylinder

title: World Bank-funded health scheme in Kerala might need more scrutiny
content: The ₹3,464-crore World Bank- assisted  Kerala Health System Improvement Programme commits the State to a 25-year-loan with a five-year grace period. Public health experts have pointed out the red flags when a State, whose total debt has surged by 80% in the last five years, takes on a 25-year World Bank loan and the pressure of repayment

title: PM Modi visits tea garden in poll-bound Assam, interacts with women workers
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi is on a day-long visit to the State to address two campaign rallies for BJP candidates

title: ‘BJP loot diwas’: Congress slams price hike of essential commodities
content: Congress president Mallikarjun Kharge said while the common citizens are hoping for relief, the BJP leadership remains entirely focused on "looting the public and plundering the nation amidst this crisis"

title: Kerala HC holds plea challenging Suresh Gopi’s 2024 Thrissur election as maintainable
content: Petition filed by a Thrissur native alleges Suresh Gopi and his election agent indulged in ‘corrupt’ practices, as mentioned in Representation of People’s Act, to solicit votes

title: Census 2027: How to do self-enumeration - a step-by-step guide
content: Census 2027 will be completely digital, with enumerators recording data from house visits on mobile applications.

title: Government releases 33 FAQs for first phase of Census
content: The portal has a list of Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs) to make it easy for the public to answer questions posed during the 16th Census of the country

title: JNU failing on social justice, SC/ST enrolment down 25%: Digvijaya Singh in Rajya Sabha
content: Mr. Singh also flagged 89 pending faculty promotion cases at JNU, of which 62 had exceeded the stipulated processing period, saying the delays were affecting career progression and PhD supervision capacity.

title: West Bengal Assembly election: Candidates scrub utensils, fry fritters to seek votes
content: One candidate washed utensils in a village home, while another carried buckets of water for an elderly woman, and the third shaved a voter at a roadside saloon

title: U.S. report flags high import duties, non-tariff barriers in India
content: The report also alleged that India's tariff rates are announced with the annual budget and are modified on an ad hoc basis through notifications in the Gazette without the opportunity for public comment

title: SIR in Bengal: 47 lakh objections disposed of till March 31, Calcutta HC Chief Justice informs Supreme Court
content: A Bench led by Chief Justice Surya Kant said they were apprised that by April 7, all objections will be decided

title: Free IPL tickets for Karnataka legislators likely to further narrow down tickets for fans
content: Interestingly, under existing ticketing norms, when a fan purchases tickets through official channels, a restriction limits each user to two tickets. In contrast, MLAs will now receive three “free tickets.”

title: Lapses in duty by Census officials can invite three years in prison
content: A letter from the Registrar General and Census Commissioner of India to Chief Secretaries of States highlights penalties under Section 11 of the Census Act, 1948, making compliance with Census duties legally enforceable

title: Census 2027 to be entirely in digital mode starting today
content: The exercise, originally scheduled for 2021, has been delayed due to COVID-19 and is now being taken up in 2027

title: T.N. Assembly election: BJP may try to split DMK alliance even if it gets a majority: Thol. Thirumavalavan
content: ‘I’ve wanted to contest in the Assembly election since 2021. How we function in the Assembly shapes the public perception. Going to Parliament is an honour. But, when I look at Tamil Nadu politics, the BJP’s strategy of gradually weakening regional parties and establishing itself is a cause for concern’

title: Looking into the continuing costs of India’s COVID-19 policy
content: Six years since the COVID-19 pandemic, the question that three books collectively pose is not whether India’s response succeeded or failed; the evidence on that is substantial. It is whether those who bear the costs of policy failure have been taken seriously enough

title: Government proposing to up Lok Sabha size by 50%; move will disadvantage southern states: Congress
content: Congress leader Jairam Ramesh said Telangana Chief Minister Revanth Reddy has already raised an alarm over the issue and others may very well follow as this proposal becomes officially public

title: Telangana Gig Workers Union welcome bill ensuring social security and dignity
content: The Bill provides statutory recognition to platform-based gig workers and proposes the creation of a tripartite welfare board comprising representatives of the government, workers, and aggregators. It also mandates registration of workers with a unique identification system and requires aggregators to register within a stipulated period.

title: Bengaluru court castigates investigation officer of Lokayukta police and assessing officials for ‘serious lapses and misleading reports’ in corruption case
content: The court found that V. Muniyappa, a former Managing Director of the Karnataka Council for Technological Upgradation, had accumulated disproportionate assets worth ₹4.13 crore — a staggering 170% above his legitimate income — during the check period from December 9, 1982, to July 15, 2014.

title: Radikaa Sarathkumar pulls off ₹75-crore ‘Thaai Kizhavi’ power move
content: As her Tamil blockbuster Thaai Kizhavi releases on OTT soon, Radikaa Sarathkumar rewrites rules of profit-sharing and ageing heroines in Tamil industry

title: 40 bags of toor dal worth ₹2.40 lakh stolen from godown in Kalaburagi district of Karnataka
content: In one of the cases, a gang broke open the lock of a godown and stole 40 bags of toor dal worth about ₹2.40 lakh

title: SIT detains son of rape accused ‘godman’ Kharat for questioning, hunt on for wife
content: At least 10 FIRs, eight for alleged sexual assault or exploitation and two for cheating, have been registered against Mr. Kharat at Sarkarwada police station in Nashik, while the SIT has received more than 100 complaints over the phone against him

title: Actor-politicians and their crusade against corruption
content: Actor and TVK founder C. Joseph Vijay’s anti-corruption plank is nothing new as the film stars floating their own parties in Tamil Nadu have taken up this theme to earn a name for themselves and garner a massive vote

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: Independents, the rebels who dare to raise the banner of protest, are reshaping political landscape
content: A wave of Independent candidates is reshaping Kerala’s electoral landscape by challenging their former party affiliations and garnering support from political rivals. While it is the UDF that has either fielded or supported the largest number of dissidents and rebels in this election, the LDF has put its weight behind 10 candidates.

title: Kerala Assembly elections: RJD’s Tejashwi Yadav joins LDF campaign; Pinarayi Vijayan hails support
content: In a post on X, Kerala CM says Tejashwi Yadav’s presence will bolster efforts to ‘protect the country’s secular fabric’

title: John Brittas slams government for treating FCRA data as ‘National Secrecy’; says all his queries were disallowed in RS
content: CPI(M) MP alleges Parliament is being denied basic regulatory information on FCRA licence cancellations and dashboard access ahead of the new amendment bill

title: T.N. Assembly election: Boycott NDA to protect Tamil Nadu’s rights, says Stalin
content: Accusing Edappadi K. Palaniswami of becoming a branch secretary of the BJP, he asserts that the NDA has to be uprooted completely to prevent Tamil Nadu from becoming a land of violence

title: New Income Tax Rules 2026: All you need to know about the new tax regime
content: The Income Tax Act 2025 is designed to replace the 1961 Act, which the Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman described as a “maze” created by over 4,000 amendments

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: UDF seeks successor to K. Babu as LDF, NDA sharpen contest in Thripunithura
content: Sensing an opportunity in the political vacuum created by K. Babu’s retirement, the LDF has fielded its sitting MLA from neighbouring Vypeen, K.N. Unnikrishnan. The UDF has chosen Kochi Deputy Mayor Deepak Joy to sustain its dominance. The NDA has ceded the constituency to its new ally, Twenty20, which has picked actor Anjali Nair.

title: Kerala Assembly polls: Every election has a new script in Aranmula
content: The constituency was formed in 2008 and the UDF won in the 2011 Assembly election. The LDF turned the tables in the next two elections, with Veena George emerging the winner, while the UDF held an edge in the Lok Sabha and local body polls

title: Heavyweight madness: Which big fella would win a 16-man tournament?
content: the men's and women's basketball tournaments haven't stopped us from creating our own hypothetical tournaments for the past few years . the big fellas will take center stage in this year's bracket . former uFC and PFL heavyweight champ Alex Pereira will move up to MMA's premier weight class on may 14 .

title: Week 8 Top 25 and how to watch
content: a big shakeup in this week's top ten . Nebraska, Alabama, Arkansas, Florida, Tennessee and UCLA all shuffling places . the Crimson Tide received a first-place vote in advance of their series against the team that received the most votes, Texas .

title: MMA divisional rankings: Grasso, Pyfer elevate their standing in knockout performances
content: the main event pitted two-time former middleweight champion Israel Adesanya against rising Joe Pyfer . he scored a second-round knockout for his fourth straight victory . former women's flyweight champion Alexa Grasso finished fellow top-10 fighter Maycee Barber in the first round .

title: How a surprise call led to 'dream' St. Brown homecoming in Germany
content: amon-Ra St. Brown received a text from a team communications staffer trying to orchestrate a facetime call with his mother . his mother, Miriam, broke the news to her youngest son that the Lions would be playing a 2026 regular-season game in her home country . the full schedule of the game will be revealed later this spring .

title: What's next for Duke, Tennessee after Elite Eight: Recruits, transfer portal, more
content: the 2026 men's NCAA tournament has featured its fair share of heartbreaking losses . but what's next for teams that didn't make it past the second weekend? what about for storied programs that did not reach the regionals?

title: Top newcomers for Notre Dame and every Big Ten team; what coaches, GMs are saying
content: coach Curt Cignetti says he ripped Michigan State transfer Nick Marsh for wearing gold cleats to practice . no conference in 2025 better felt how quality newcomers can reshape rosters like the Big Ten .

title: 2026 rankings: Profiling the top 35 QBs
content: the 2024 NFL MVP has finished in the top 10 in passing TDs six seasons in a row and remains a major threat with his legs . despite seeing less passing volume the past two seasons (14th or lower in pass attempts both years), he has finished second among quarterbacks in fantasy points . his 21.4 fantasy points per game in 2025 was actually his lowest since 2019 .

title: Early Men's Final Four preview: Arizona-Michigan, UConn-Illinois predictions
content: the 2026 men's final four is set for saturday's national semifinals against Illinois . the final weekend of the tournament will be a final weekend for the team . Arizona ranked fifth in the country in paint points, averaging more than 42 .

title: 2026 World Cup European playoffs recap: Bosnia deny Italy for third straight World Cup
content: Gab Marcotti reacts to Italy failing to qualify for a third straight World Cup after losing to Bosnia and Herzegovina on penalties. (1:37) The final spots for the 2026  FIFA World Cup  will be decided Tuesday. In Europe, four matches determined which teams will be coming to this summer's tournament in North America. Sweden  defeated  Poland  and  Türkiye  defeated  Kosovo  to book their spots in the 90 minutes as the two winning teams returned to the World Cup for the first time since 2018 and 2002, respectively. However, two games went to penalties, and in the end, it was  Czechia  that eliminated  Denmark  to return to the World Cup for the first time since 2006, and finally we had  Bosnia and Herzegovina  defeat  Italy  as the  Azzurri  failed to qualify for the World Cup a third straight time. Enjoy all that happened from Tuesday's matches!

title: If England are going to win the World Cup, it's because of Harry Kane
content: a credible debate over whether England can win the 2026 world cup with Harry Kane . the 32-year-old's fitness record is generally excellent, but it is the sort of situation that could arise in what England will be hopeful is a seven-game run at this summer's tournament .

title: Player ratings: Pulisic 3/10 in USMNT's disappointing loss to Portugal
